entry.title: Taylor Swift defeats Florida poet's plagiarism lawsuit

Maine's Democratic Party calls for Platner to drop out of race
US service sector growth dips in June; employment rebounds after months of contraction
US makes available $281 mln in grants for addiction and mental health programs
Despite some big losses, Supreme Court rewards Trump's power play
entry.summary: Jumpstart your morning with the latest legal news delivered straight to your inbox from The Daily Docket newsletter. Sign up here. Reporting by John Kruzel and Andrew Chung; Editing by Will Dunham Our Standards: The Thomson Reuters Trust Principles. , opens new tab

Reporting by Nate Raymond in Boston; Editing by Aurora Ellis and Stephen Coates Our Standards: The Thomson Reuters Trust Principles. , opens new tab Nate Raymond reports on the federal judiciary and litigation. He can be reached at .

entry.title: Watchdog faults Secret Service for missing 102 radio calls during 2024 Trump shooting
entry.summary: Jumpstart your morning with the latest legal news delivered straight to your inbox from The Daily Docket newsletter. Sign up here. Reporting by Jasper Ward in Washington; editing by Ross Colvin, Donna Bryson and Rod Nickel Our Standards: The Thomson Reuters Trust Principles. , opens new tab Jasper Ward is a breaking news reporter in Washington. She primarily covers national affairs and U.S. politics. Jasper was previously based in The Bahamas where she covered the collapse of FTX and the subsequent arrest of its founder Sam Bankman-Fried. She was a part of the Reuters team that won the Gerald Loeb Award for breaking news for its FTX coverage.
